headline: Ross Stores Inc (NASDAQ:ROST) Qualifies as a Quality Investment Through the Caviar Cruise Stock Screener
summary: Ross Stores (ROST) passes the Caviar Cruise quality screen with strong revenue and EBIT growth, high ROIC, low debt, and solid profitability, though its premium valuation warrants careful consideration.
